behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names ffi.zig, required identifiers (generateSymbols, symbols_iter, isEmptyOrUndefinedOrNull, clearAndFree), critical files (build.zig, CMakeLists.txt, tsconfig.json, package.json), banned patterns (std.fs.Dir, std.fs.cwd, std.debug.assert), and the arg_types cleanup requirement.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug (non-object descriptors crash) and expected behavior (throw TypeError) without specifying the exact check (!value.isObject()) or exact line.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: The test accepts multiple type-check approaches (isObject, isStruct, isCallable, isFunction, @intFromEnum, .tag, typeof, jsType) rather than requiring specific gold code.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Per the docstring 'All checks therefore operate on source analysis' — tests are regex/string inspections of ffi.zig plus prettier/JSON checks; they never execute the fixed Zig code.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_value_guard_rejects_non_objects requires a type-check alongside isEmptyOrUndefinedOrNull and the arg_types cleanup tests require actual code additions; a stub wouldn't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the non-object guard behavior and the arg_types cleanup requirement described in instruction.md.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) and tagged with [static]/[repo_tests]/[pr_diff].

structured_data_schema.reason: Task fixes a Zig source bug, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers (ffi.zig, generateSymbols, symbols_iter) match the repo.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The file under investigation is scoped but exact line/function fix is not named; the bug is FFI-domain and naming the file is acceptable.
